failed_attempts.sql:
WITH target_profile AS (
    SELECT id 
    FROM profile 
    WHERE username = 'haight_clothing'
),
target_publications AS (
    SELECT id 
    FROM publication 
    WHERE profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM target_profile)
)
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation,
    c.num_likes
FROM comment c
WHERE c.publication_id IN (SELECT id FROM target_publications)
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC, c.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

failed_attempts.sql:
SELECT 
    c.profile_id AS profile_id,
    c.annotation,
    c.num_likes
FROM comment c
JOIN publication p ON c.publication_id = p.id
JOIN profile p_owner ON p.profile_id = p_owner.id
WHERE p_owner.username = 'haight_clothing'
ORDER BY c.num_likes DESC, c.published_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
